violations.description: FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Cardboar noted being used as a non slip mat in front of fryer. Some floor areas under equipment in the kitchen noted in need of cleaning.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored not covered in food storage area.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice machine interior not properly maintained.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors around equipment noted in need of cleaning. Cardboard noted being used as matt in front of grill.
